textByHash.1cfe777a4640a0ff765fcbb546e28cbda2c714ae: Hang on, I know you knights aren't allowed in West Ardougne. You're an imposter! Get out!
textByHash.3b2bb439053763461c64c69c082f43cb547c50d7: And why would a citizen be the one telling me this? Don't waste my time.
textByHash.74c602b3976976e1bd9dd6ebfdd1e6753946a237: New taxes? What are you talking about?
textByHash.8d6375fa8f0a196c33b86108e19b1da79b5f8cd9: But I barely make any money here. I can't afford to pay new taxes.
textByHash.bfc92eb7b212cb6bccec45e752205c4b4f9d5dd3: Good day. What can I get you?
textByHash.f46fd6a602b5ccd57d6123ca13b62748dd10890b: The people won't allow this to continue!
